$comment: POINTER ONLY — this example is committed; the real file is NOT.
$where: Copy to $AIBENDER_HOME/identity-map.json (default ~/.aibender/identity-map.json). That file stays machine-local FOREVER [X2]: it maps real identities (account emails, org/account UUIDs, AWS account ids) to the placeholder labels. Never commit it, never copy it into the tree.
$format: Each label key holds an array of identity strings. Keys starting with $ are ignored by the loader (@aibender/shared loadIdentityMap). Unknown label keys, non-string entries, and identities mapped to two labels are rejected loudly.
